revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} A <kbd>country_data</kbd> template is also available for [[:en:Sudan|Sudan]], of which [[:en:South Sudan|South Sudan]] was part until 9 July 2011: {| style="background-color:#ecfcf4" | [[Template:Country data Sudan]] || {{flag|Sudan}} |- |}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Country data templates of countries|South Sudan]] [[Category:Country data templates of South Sudan| ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_South_Sudan%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_South_Sudan%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{documentation subpage}} A <kbd>country_data</kbd> template is also available for [[:en:Sudan|Sudan]], of which [[:en:South Sudan|South Sudan]] was part until 9 July 2011: {| style="background-color:#ecfcf4" | [[Template:Country data Sudan]] || {{flag|Sudan}} |- |}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Country data templates of countries|South Sudan]] [[Category:Country data templates of South Sudan| ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
